# Thread: Symptoms Gone From Gadolinium Poisoning New Outlook Ahead Teaching Others
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/symptoms-gone-from-gadolinium-poisoning-new-outlook-ahead-teaching-others.23891/>
**Subforum:** Success Stories
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jenifer Caplan — 2019-07-03T19:34:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/symptoms-gone-from-gadolinium-poisoning-new-outlook-ahead-teaching-others.23891/post-273640>

Feb 8 2018 I had mitochondrial failure related to Gadolinium injection from an MRI. It took 2 months of searching things online to find out what to do to help myself as their are no Doctures that an treat this condition. I stumbled upon this idea of mitochondria and that led me to find Dr Kruse and after 18 months with researching 18 hrs a day and trying different things mostly changing lifestyle and environment ( I have been to playa del carmen three times btw) I can finally say that I am physically and mentally fully functioning, feel healthy and I have energy.

I can tell you it was not an easy road and I jumped down many info wormholes to get where I am today. I have grown so much from the information and connections that I made reading and researching the teachings that Dr Kruse has shared and I took this idea of energy even further to being to explore a connection to the subtle energy phases of quantum science.

I feel as though Dr Kruse has brought so much to the table and speaks to the "physical energy" in his teachings yet we have other forms of energy in and around us that also effect us and our overall health and this concept has led me to explore more of the quantum perspective and the subtle energies.

The problem with the subtle energies and this concept of energy healing is that they are not fully accepted in the medical community, yet the science over the last few years does show amazing studies of how the brain is connected to the outside world and how our brain waves and the energies we have with our thoughts can also lead to our bodies producing the chemicals that we need to be optimal as well.

We have pharmacies in our brains and our thoughts can make a difference in how our bodies work. Beliefs are also fascinating and can lead you to heal much faster if you can understand how to harness the power of the brain and understand how you have so much power and that your taught to give up this power to the "industrial medical complex". I am not saying there is not a place for Doctors, there of course is, however we need to look at all options to take back control of our health care.

As my connections branch out I have taken a real interest in sound healing. I see extraordinary results with myslef as n=1 and It is based in science and in a techy way especially with vibroacoustical devices.

I have also recently been trained on the bio-well device which uses gdv technology to visually show how energy is balanced or unbalanced in the body. I have become certified in Reiki and I have been learning about tuning forks and how they help people with pain and emotional issues.

I have even started a consulting practice where I use these devices and the subtle energy perspective as well as the mitochondriac wisdom and the hacks to teach people how to incorporate the information to attain wellness in their lives.

Lastly I have also started a non-profit called **The Bio Energy Healing Association,** where our mission is to teach and hold events in schools and the local community on **how the physical mitochondria wisdom connects with the subtle energy healing modalities. Our goal is to have a formal program in place to bring to the local schools and community groups and hospitals**

At this stage I am I am currently looking to find **board members for my association** who are familiar with Dr Kruse,s Work, or anyone who has training and an interest in energy healing modalities. If anyone wants to know more about what I am doing or interested in leaning about the non profit please feel free to email at [jennscap1@gmail.com](mailto:jennscap1@gmail.com) or call me anytime 917-568-5992

### Jack Kruse — 2022-02-10T16:16:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/symptoms-gone-from-gadolinium-poisoning-new-outlook-ahead-teaching-others.23891/post-309857>

[https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/gadolinium-toxicity-5g-diseases-jack-kruse/](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/gadolinium-toxicity-5g-diseases-jack-kruse/)

### John Schumacher — 2022-02-10T17:04:00+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/symptoms-gone-from-gadolinium-poisoning-new-outlook-ahead-teaching-others.23891/post-309864>

> [Jack Kruse said:](/goto/post?id=309857)
>
> [https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/gadolinium-toxicity-5g-diseases-jack-kruse/](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/gadolinium-toxicity-5g-diseases-jack-kruse/)

This is one of the cases where chelation therapy maybe appropriate.

Gadolinium-based contrast agents – what is the evidence for ‘gadolinium deposition disease’ and the use of chelation therapy?
[https://sci-hub.se/10.1080/15563650.2019.1681442](https://sci-hub.se/10.1080/15563650.2019.1681442)

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

A variety of chelating agents are used to treat patients with heavy metal toxicity and there are currently 11 FDA-approved chelators available in the United States by prescription. Gadolinium-based contrast agents are comprised of gadolinium ions which are bonded to chelating ligands to improve stability and reduce toxicity. Gadopentetate dimeglumine contains the chelate diethylenetriaminepentaacetic acid (DTPA) and was the first gadolinium chelate to be used as a gadolinium-based contrast agent in clinical practice. Gadolinium-based contrast agent preparations typically contain excess volumes of chelate to reduce free (unbound) gadolinium ions within the solution.
​

_However, for those who may read this reply - chelation therapy is very taxing on the body. Your redox must be ready for it and supported during treatment._

​

# Thread: Time to get Optimal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/time-to-get-optimal.23894/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### KrystleSky — 2019-07-04T07:20:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/time-to-get-optimal.23894/post-273665>

Hi all,

Thought I'd start a journal to record goals, progress, problems etc.

History: Born via c-section then breastfed. My Mum describes me as a very allergic child, not food allergies but washing powders, skin creams etc. I had seasonal asthma and through childhood had recurrent tonsillitis, ear infections etc. Had tonsils and adenoids removed around age 5 after many courses of antibiotics. As a teen the path of antibiotics continued until I moved out of home at age 18 and decided not to go back to any more GPs because antibiotics didn't help despite seemingly being on them over Winter.

Upon leaving home, I started spending more time inside and awake through the night. I gained weight really quickly and have never lost it. Other than weight gain, I managed to stop the cycle of throat and ear issues and antibiotics and have not used them since.

Between the ages of 24 and 30 I had 3 children, all straightforward natural births (2 at home). When my youngest turned about 1 I started suffering from anxiety and a combination of exhaustion and overwhelm. I didn't realise it at the time, but during that pregnancy and her first year of life we were living in a house with a significant mold problem. Once it was identified, we moved within 2 weeks and for the following year I had increased anxiety, my whole body broke out in a rash and was like this for 6 or 7 months. I was working with a naturopath who seemed to think I was detoxing mold through my skin once I was out of that environment.

We've since moved house again and I've learned coping strategies with the anxiety, but I feel far from optimal. I've spent too many years eating crap food, drinking too much wine, staying up all night looking at screens.

Family Tree: My paternal grandmother is 94 and has just moved into a retirement type home, still independent but the house was too much for her. I feel like I can learn so much from her. Ironically, she spent many years worrying that she would die young because her mother died in her 40s. She's fit, well and lived largely eating meat and veg, seasonal produce grown in the garden and spends her days in the garden or outside. Doesn't drink, never smoked and has had a wonderful life.

On the other hand my maternal grandmother is somewhat of a medical marvel. She loves prescription medication, doesn't exercise, has diabetes and no interest in healthy eating. She's somehow still alive and has reached 83 despite all indications pointing to the fact that she's probably shouldn't still be alive.

My Goals:
At the moment I need to get control of the anxiety. This week my mind has been spinning out about melanoma. I've recently returned from spending 8 months travelling around Asia, and I'm wondering whether the contrast of lots of sunlight and long days for those months and now being in an Aussie winter, maybe my vitamin D levels have dropped a bit. We're also in the process of buying a house so there's been a bit of stress and uncertainty since returning home. I'm hoping that in the next 2 months a few more pieces and routines will fall into place to start moving towards a less worried future.

I need to lose the weight, and stop sooking about the cold and just get on with CT. I was doing cold showers in Asia, but it's hardly a challenge when the water coming out of the tap is warm. Going to start with face dunks this evening.

My main goal is to sort myself out so I know how to lead my kids forward with all the changes happening.

Changes so far:
Eating more seafood than I have done in years. Sometimes it's farmed or tinned, not sure whether this is a no no. I live rurally so there's much more grassfed beef around than seafood.

Drinking either Italian sparkling water or Evian.

Getting daily sun exposure, especially around solar noon.

Wearing blueblockers in the evening.

Switching wifi off at night. Planning to hard wire everything in the new house.

Thank that's all for now.

### JanSz — 2019-07-04T17:40:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/time-to-get-optimal.23894/post-273682>

# Thread: Niacin + Infrared Sauna ?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/niacin-infrared-sauna.23897/>
**Subforum:** Success Stories
**Posts:** 13
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jackie Nelson — 2019-07-05T04:05:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/niacin-infrared-sauna.23897/post-273704>

I know Dr. Kruse is not a big supplement fan and since listening to most of his talks, I've also cut way
back. Only things I take now are iodoral and selenium and occasionally some magnesium (high steak and seafood diet).
But I've been reading about the niacin / sauna detox and it sounds like people are getting great results. I'm
especially interested in the eye improvements. Also have remnants of vitiligo that I'm convinced occurred after living in a highly flouridated water location (Barbados). Does anyone know what Dr. Kruse thinks of the Niacin detox?
I'd be very interested to know. Thanks.

### ElectricUniverse — 2019-07-05T18:01:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/niacin-infrared-sauna.23897/post-273728>

I haven't tried the niacin hack, but I would if I had access to a sauna.

It is nothing new (there is nothing new under the sun anyway-- pardon pun). It is the Hubbard Protocol.

It was pioneered by _L Ron Hubbard_ (of dubious Scientology fame) way, way back in the day to help people detox from drug intoxication. From most accounts it is efficacious in detoxing many toxicants.

### Jackie Nelson — 2019-07-05T23:08:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/niacin-infrared-sauna.23897/post-273742>

Oh dear ! I once tried reading a book by L. Ron Hubbard and thought it was convoluted nonsense. But, the detox is recommended by several people I respect. Interesting that red meat and liver contains a lot of niacin ... maybe that's why the carnivore group do so well? Most who recommend this detox also
say that the sauna has to be infrared, but can't see why a normal sauna wouldn't work because suspect it's the heat that is the important factor ... or maybe it's the red light ... not sure. In any case, will try it and see what happens.

### Sheddie — 2019-07-06T05:21:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/niacin-infrared-sauna.23897/post-273750>

The relevant book is, _Clear Body, Clear Mind._ Most public libraries should have a copy. The text was comprehensive enough_._ From what I remember it discussed chemical and drug 'trash' that remains in the body indefinitely and says this protocol will release that buildup. Also, it said that radiation from very old sunburns would surface and leave the body. I forget if it mentioned heavy metals or not.

I did a 30-day run using, back then, a hot rocks sauna off a residential pool in October. Basically, there was first a warm up to get the circulation going, then a rather long list of supplements , including salt, and their dose quantities. The niacin was started SLOWLY and only increased the day after the 'flush' response of the last dose hike waned. As I recall, I increased the niacin dose about every 2-3 days. Yes, we went up to several thousand milligrams but in very specifically cautious increments, as the book explained. It was strongly advised to do the protocol with a buddy. As I recall we were in the sauna for 6-8 hours each day, with short breaks to jump in the pool. That type of sauna went to much higher temps than the ones today, maybe 180 degrees F. That kind of heat for that many hours was very oppressive. Two days after I finished the 30 days, I came down with a cold and didn't wish to medicate in the detoxed state I'd worked long and hard to acquire. I went through the first all natural fever and fever-breaking episode I'd ever known. (Medical professional parents always medicated us kids whenever we had a cold...) The next year I got a 4-person FIR sauna, long enough to lie down in, with ceramic emitters, for my home use. This type of (infrared) sauna was much 'cooler.' I used niacin regularly, but never again to the high dose I worked up to over 30 days doing the protocol by the book. A decent sweat for me with FIR would take about 60 minutes if I was using the sauna regularly.

Two years ago I put NIR lamps in my FIR sauna and have mostly just used NIR (8 Sauna Space lamps in a ~4 x 6 foot 'box.') Gets up a decent sweat in 15-20 minutes. I don't have to lie down for that short a time. I haven't used niacin with the NIR lamps. Probably because, after all, I'm now over 20 years older than when I did the full protocol. Otherwise, I'm not sure of the red NIR lamp sauna along with niacin, especially as the NIR lamps really speed up the sweat response... If anyone sees info re: NIR sauna with niacin, please post it, or if someone has tried it?

### ElectricUniverse — 2019-07-06T18:29:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/niacin-infrared-sauna.23897/post-273774>

> [Jackie Nelson said:](/goto/post?id=273742)

> Oh dear ! I once tried reading a book by L. Ron Hubbard and thought it was convoluted nonsense. But, the detox is recommended by several people I respect. Interesting that red meat and liver contains a lot of niacin ... maybe that's why the carnivore group do so well? Most who recommend this detox also
> say that the sauna has to be infrared, but can't see why a normal sauna wouldn't work because suspect it's the heat that is the important factor ... or maybe it's the red light ... not sure. In any case, will try it and see what happens.

As I recall, Hubbard (for whom the human mind was his concern) was working on methods to systemically clear out body residues of big pharma psychoactive drugs (including drugs to treat schizophrenia, etc.) Back then there was not a big deal about need to detox everyday toxic chemicals, heavy metals etc. Glyphosate was not in use then.

**Scientologists**, no matter the merits of their 'religion'. were virtuously in the forefront of the fight against using dangerous pharma drugs (still in use today) to treat mentally ill people.

All saunas work for this, the idea is to be sweating. Hell, you could probably take niacin, go sit in the sun if hot enough, and sweat your ass off/lipolisis.

NIR (heat lamp sauna) works too, you just need to be in a real enclosure to increase temp. Binders, binders, binders. Did I say binders? Research them. It makes a difference if you're going to do modified protocol.

### ElectricUniverse — 2019-08-16T23:00:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/niacin-infrared-sauna.23897/post-276110>

Saunas are great, but they are not for everyone.

I preach the virtues of detoxification protocols, but they need to be done right. Please do your due diligence research.

Yes, there are quite a few detox binders used by pros and consumers alike-- activated charcoal, clays, chitosan, fiber-rich supplements, chlorella, zeolite, algins/pectins etc. The old standbys for heavy metal detoxing like DMPS and DMSA, EDTA seem to have fallen out of favor because of side effects and the remarkable effectiveness of natural binders.

You also need good bile flow to make sure toxins processed in liver are not backed up in the system, and are carefully ushered from gall bladder out into GI tract where binders can then safely escort them out of body.

If you are into serious detoxing you have to have binders on board or the wheels will come off your program and you will get sick, possibly very sick. No one wants to feel like they have the flu everyday, believe me.

# Thread: Primary Water

**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Steven Sokinas — 2019-07-05T18:35:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/primary-water.23898/post-273730>

Hi all...

Have you guys ever heard of primary water?
[http://www.primarywaterinstitute.org](http://www.primarywaterinstitute.org)

Apparently, our planet produces water within the earth as being first and not what we were told in school.

### JanSz — 2019-07-05T20:35:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/primary-water.23898/post-273738>

[@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/)

### Glenn A — 2022-11-06T19:00:50+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/primary-water.23898/post-317352>

> [Steven Sokinas said:](/goto/post?id=273730)
>
> Hi all...
>
> Have you guys ever heard of primary water?
> [http://www.primarywaterinstitute.org](http://www.primarywaterinstitute.org)
>
> Apparently, our planet produces water within the earth as being first and not what we were told in school.

Definitely heard of Primary Water Steven! After reading some on the thread "Should I be drinking plain RO water...." which discussed spring water, I realized that "spring water" was assumed to all be alike and that nobody was mentioning Primary Water springs, so I searched here and found you have the first post mentioning this in the Title and could not easily find any other mention of it on the Forum. Very interesting, as Primary water as is often available in a "spring" is not from the normally discussed hydrologic cycle.

It should be of great interest on this forum that if one is using Primary Water, they are avoiding the intake of both deuterium and tritium, as they have water that has been put together within the Earth very simply, just as our bodies create water from the Krebs cycle. Primary Water is virtually an inexhaustible resource, as the Earth is still composing it as it has been for millions of years.

Actually, "Spring" water companies such as Sparkletts, Arrowhead, and various other Nestle subsidiaries have known of Primary Water for decades. They don't publicize their technology, but they use well drillers that know and use techniques like oil well drillers use, minus the horizontal aspect to drill where there is a deep fracture within the crust (and amazingly, usually in granite). With the proper techniques, pioneered by the likes of Stephen Reese in the USA but used world-wide, there is usually a high chance of getting a very productive, often artesian Primary Water well.

I first happened on such use of this type of water in the 1960's by Arrowhead Water Co. which would fill up tank trucks in Waterman Canyon, San Bernardino, California. They were taking advantage of a fissure that had already for decades been providing steam at a resort known as Arrowhead Springs which advertised it's "steam caves" available to the public. A hotel was built on that spot in 1868, but Spanish explorers knew about the spring location over 200 years ago, recorded in 1820 by Spanish missionaries.

[https://www.sbcity.org/about/history/arrowhead\_springs\_hotels](https://www.sbcity.org/about/history/arrowhead_springs_hotels)

All that was needed at that location to get a good strong flow of water from deep in the earth was to drill down a bit to develop a larger hole into the aquifer that always existed in the fracture.

In the 2000's a water company did the same thing on the Morongo Indian Reservation near Cabazon, CA and has been producing spring water for the Los Angeles area to the present date.

[https://www.desertsun.com/story/new...ttling-plant-responds-aquifer-story/13019397/](https://www.desertsun.com/story/news/2014/07/22/nestle-arrowhead-bottling-plant-responds-aquifer-story/13019397/)

What is hillarious is the political nature of this story. The Paper is complaining about the withdrawal of water from this well as it "prevents the use of the water for the Coachella Valley". Now the Coachella Valley is where Palm Spring, Indian Wells, and Desert Hot Springs exists, and which has it's own huge aquifer which already supports a huge population, including over 100 golf courses! Like the need a little more water!

I have a friend in Lakeside, CA in San Diego County. She has a 760 foot well and happens to be just blocks from a Sparklets water plant that is pulling from a 1000 foot well, obviously drilled to get Primary Water. How do these water companies know where to drill?

Yes, they use the services such as those you mentioned in your link. The powers that be don't want the public to know there is unlimited water. They want people to live in fear and the Cabal can always create water "shortages" as long as people don't know about Primary Water. Right now desertification is a start on that. Stop the rains, ruin the Earth surface with annual crops, and you get deserts and a continual depletion of aquifers. But just remember, if you have the knowledge, you aren't bothered at all. There is water available all over the Earth, often in desert areas with very low precipitation. The hydrologists don't even recognize this water. They have their heads buried in the proverbial sand thinking there is a "water cycle" that leaves animals dependent on what returns to earth from rain and exists as "ground water". No way.

But there are Primary Water wells being drilled all over the Earth now. Here's more links:

This guy was still a master at getting Primary Water in his 80's and had drilled many places, usually with great success:

[https://www.sandiegoreader.com/news/1985/jun/06/cover-theres-water-down-below/](https://www.sandiegoreader.com/news/1985/jun/06/cover-theres-water-down-below/)

If you want a complete recount of how a Primary Water well is prospected and developed, here is one:

### ElectricUniverse — 2019-07-06T18:21:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/biogeometry-a-bit-woo-woo.23899/post-273772>

> [Steven Sokinas said:](/goto/post?id=273731)
>
> I wanted to share this with you all...
>
> [https://www.biogeometry.ca/electrosmog-the-miracle-of-hemberg](https://www.biogeometry.ca/electrosmog-the-miracle-of-hemberg)

Of course I use Biogeometry tools in daily life, and I highly recommend this modality.

**A positive thing to note about the Hemberg Experiment** (you linked to it) is that, like other so-called scalar EMF protection devices, these Biogeometry shapes indeed may alleviate emotional and physical stresses that come from subsequent RF/MW radiofrequency radiation compression waves.

However, I have profound doubts that these subtle energy interventions do much to protect from original source EMF radiation (electromagnetic fields). It is still there and probably is still doing some harm at a physiological level (not to mention the physics involved).

Do not be lulled into a false sense of safety. If you are exposed to high levels of these EMFs your best choice is to move, second best step is to install proper shielding in your domicile. Did I say install **proper** shielding? Yes, and it has to be measurable in terms of mitigation results.

### drezy — 2019-07-07T03:21:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/biogeometry-a-bit-woo-woo.23899/post-273786>

> [ElectricUniverse said:](/goto/post?id=273772)
>
> Do not be lulled into a false sense of safety.

Great point.

Even worse, materials and structures that impede one frequency will guide another frequency. I don't currently have google at my disposal but you can likely image.google.com search for "glass waveguide" or just plain "waveguide" and see some pretty funky materials and shapes. The first time I inherited an LTE RF development project part of the measurement system looked like someone took a stretched cube of glass and hit it with a hint of chrome spray paint from 5 feet away then jammed it into a circuit board.

The point is that a structure or geometry insulating you at MHz frequencies may act very differently at higher GHz. You'd want to be very careful, don't even take my word on any of it, and measure or just get a pro to measure anything you were setting up permanently.

### ElectricUniverse — 2019-07-07T18:29:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/biogeometry-a-bit-woo-woo.23899/post-273817>

> [drezy said:](/goto/post?id=273786)
>
> Great point.
>
> Even worse, materials and structures that impede one frequency will guide another frequency. I don't currently have google at my disposal but you can likely image.google.com search for "glass waveguide" or just plain "waveguide" and see some pretty funky materials and shapes. The first time I inherited an LTE RF development project part of the measurement system looked like someone took a stretched cube of glass and hit it with a hint of chrome spray paint from 5 feet away then jammed it into a circuit board.
>
> The point is that a structure or geometry insulating you at MHz frequencies may act very differently at higher GHz. You'd want to be very careful, don't even take my word on any of it, and measure or just get a pro to measure anything you were setting up permanently.

**RF/MW shielding is always a mixed bag**, and not for weekend DIYs who don't have a clue. Life seems to be full of confounding uncertainties.

There seems to be a lot of misunderstanding and confusion about shielding. Some examples:

-   Should you ground your shielding materials?
-   What are the implications of jump conduction with a typical metallic shield deployment?
-   Is a true Faraday Cage-type setup harmful in unknown ways?
-   Is personal shielding clothing helpful or harmful, on balance?
-   Are metal electrical conductors in your house (e.g. pipes, wiring, metal trim, rooftop TV antennae, metal furniture, etc.) acting as EMF field amplifiers (or waveguides)?
-   If outside RF leaks into your shielded dwelling will you have inadvertently created a large microwave 'oven' ?
-   Is it true that Tetra radio signals used by public safety depts (e.g. first responders, etc) will pass through almost any material?

# Thread: Flowfest 2019..........
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/flowfest-2019.23903/>
**Subforum:** Success Stories
**Posts:** 12
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-08T07:47:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/flowfest-2019.23903/post-273831>

I'll have a lot more to say about this 9 days in Europe soon as I get back on the plane to New Orleans. I put a hot dragon breath on many broken pieces of glass across the pond. I conjured up many songs as I unleashed some of my passion. The song below has some powerful undertones of what was going below my facade as I did what I do.
You must believe in yourself. Surround yourself with a small group of people who are the people you want breathing fire on you when you've broken something in your life. Use their heat to create something new to thrive. This life is not about survival of the fittest, it is about the **_survival of the WISEST._**

That is the Black Swan lesson of what blue light and nnEMF will do to you. Your circle of six has to be trusted to pack your parachute as well as you do IT for yourself. Your survival is tied to this parachute. It is the most critical hack one must do in a blue-lit 5G world. The people in Europe got to see a decidedly different Jack. This Jack has put himself in his own furnace to melt his own pieces of broken glass to make something new and better of himself. He is jumping off his own cliff without wings because he is sure his parachute is well packed for the first time in a long time.

Once you have the right mix of misfits in your circle, you' be braver to do the things you must in a varying environment that is designed to put your submolecular chaos 24/7. You'll tap things you could not fathom buried inside of your fabric. You're braver than you think, more talented than you know, and capable of more than you imagine because you've become a "wiser wilded animal" because you NOW FULLY VALUE how you think. Your new beliefs will manifest from your NEW ability to think well. You value how you think because you've MADE A CHOICE to return to the things in NATURE that will rebuild you in this shitty man-made environment.

Peace out. I'm packing my parachute now for the trip across the pond.

# Thread: Lil’Darling
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lil%E2%80%99darling.23904/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### *~Allison~* — 2019-07-08T14:14:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/lil%E2%80%99darling.23904/post-273846>

“The smiles returning to their faces
Little Darling
It seems like years since it’s been here.”

That was one of my most favorite songs my dad would sing & play me on his guitar & has been my anthem these last couple weeks at my sunrise viewings. My aunt & uncle sung it for me at my dad’s funeral in 2016. My dad & I were best friends; however I handled his passing with much grace due to our deep understanding of life & death & many long hours theorizing. He’s the one who inspired my questions. I LOVE questions & I must say I ask some really good ones lol. I like that about Dr Kruse. The quality of the question really dictates the quality of the answer. I have a few doozies I’m almost ready to ask

I’ve been deep in my Kruse studies for about a month now and I have new hope; it seems like years since it’s been here. The day I watched Luke Storey interview my favorite online chiropractor Dr Bergman, was the day I found Dr Kruse. It was on a whim I checked out Lukes channel & reluctantly clicked on the Kruse EMF podcast. ( I get sick to my stomach RE: EMF.) Anyhow, Dr Kruse spoke to my soul. Every once in a while I come across someone like him who changes the course of my life & I think ... man, I wonder what past life’s we had together? I must of done something great to deserve this now. ☺️ A smile is returning to my face. All of us here have surely cracked similar codes on our journey through the infinite together. Strong, high-functioning, intelligent people don’t just randomly end up together on a forum like this.

I look forward to continuing our path together on this very exciting dimension! Thank you for having me ... I’m ALL-IN ... however I have a real aversion to technology so I won’t be on here as much as I would prefer. It’ll be a very rare day to find me on Facebook either. BUT I did read the Epi paleo RX already ✔️

**Posts:** 1

### jenslangenbach_germany — 2019-07-08T22:56:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leptin-rx-lab-testing.23907/post-273880>

Hi everyone,

after being on the leptin rx for almost 2 months now, me being a numbers nut and one of those over curious persons, i would like to know if there are labs that you can get done that give you a better understanding of success of the leptin rx.

i could see dr. kruse talk/write about the t3, t4 and especially rt3 values, but i couldn't find source as to what range those values should be in, and probably rightfully so, because they probably depend on other values and the person's individual n=1.

trying to understand the relationships between the hormones and all that a little more.

thanks for everybody that might participate in this.

have a good nite - from germany.

# Thread: Possible neurodegeneration
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/possible-neurodegeneration.23908/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### craig donovan — 2019-07-09T03:42:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/possible-neurodegeneration.23908/post-273888>

Hi Guys,
I'm new to the Jack Kruse protocols. I'm trying to find some info on neurodegeneration reversal. I was wondering if there is any info or links that may be able to help with the questions below. ( I realise each case is specific and has many factors involved).
A hypothetical question;
In regards to the alpha synuclein misfolding in many neurodegenerative diseases e.g..parkinson MSA etc
(possible epigenetic causes- ) Would you consider mitochondrial dysfunction the main cause to commence this process?
Can Jack's protocol followed with a high level of discipline possibly reverse some cases?
How long a time range if disease can be reversed could you expect to see results?

### Katie Durham — 2019-07-09T13:40:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/possible-neurodegeneration.23908/post-273907>

Craig, Jack has a monster thread on Parkinson's, last active on June 28 (so search or scroll to find it). His last post, #109, links to a study that shows researchers have found fragments of organelles like pieces of mitochondria when fibrils would have been expected instead. This is mitochondrial dysfunction in that proper autophagy would have kept it from happening, and to me is a very encouraging finding because you can fight that on your own! My brother was recently diagnosed with PD but doesn't want to listen to me so I expect a continuing decline when I don't believe it has to happen that way. If you're asking on behalf of yourself, you likely have much higher incentive to implement his recommendations than a friend or loved one of yours would have. Where you're living could be a major factor so you need to be open to moving. Good luck!

### drezy — 2019-07-09T13:45:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/possible-neurodegeneration.23908/post-273908>

Like this?
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...otoelectrical-defect.22824/page-6#post-273435](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/parkinsons-disease-begins-as-an-photoelectrical-defect.22824/page-6#post-273435)

### Katie Durham — 2019-07-09T15:43:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/possible-neurodegeneration.23908/post-273914>

Yes drezy, thanks!

lowbluelights dot com has the following helpful book. It doesn't go far enough but it supports what Doc is saying.

Parkinson's Disease: Evidence that avoiding blue light before bedtime may delay/avoid onset of the symptoms, by Dr. Richard L. Hansler.

# Thread: My tallest hurdle, reconnecting with family
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-tallest-hurdle-reconnecting-with-family.23909/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 12
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Dave Key — 2019-07-09T05:56:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-tallest-hurdle-reconnecting-with-family.23909/post-273891>

A few days after arriving in Mexico I had days of feeling better than ever. After 10 days here mother's day rolled around again. It had been 4 years since we spoke, and I wanted to end the silence, the grudge, the negativity that goes with it all. I was finally feeling well enough to deal with whatever came of it.
I didn't know whát to say so I texted Happy Mother's day and we've been chatting almost every day since. Best of all, she's my latest mitochondriac in training. She has been the easiest to speak with because I don't have to dumb it down. She took biochemistry and microbiology in med school (LSUS), used to teach microbiology lab to med students, and minored in immunology.
She was interested in learning more so I just sent copies of EpiPaleo Rx and Becker's Body Electric for her to read on...and I can't wait to hear her reaction.

Just like that, years of bitterness washed away!

### drezy — 2019-07-09T09:30:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-tallest-hurdle-reconnecting-with-family.23909/post-273893>

Dave that's an excellent story. I'm glad you reconnected.

Thanks for writing it here. It really brightened up my day.

### caroline — 2019-07-09T10:26:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-tallest-hurdle-reconnecting-with-family.23909/post-273898>

> [Dave Key said:](/goto/post?id=273891)

> A few days after arriving in Mexico I had days of feeling better than ever. After 10 days here mother's day rolled around again. It had been 4 years since we spoke, and I wanted to end the silence, the grudge, the negativity that goes with it all. I was finally feeling well enough to deal with whatever came of it.
> I didn't know whát to say so I texted Happy Mother's day and we've been chatting almost every day since. Best of all, she's my latest mitochondriac in training. She has been the easiest to speak with because I don't have to dumb it down. She took biochemistry and microbiology in med school (LSUS), used to teach microbiology lab to med students, and minored in immunology.
> She was intetested in learning more so I just sent copies of EpiPaleo Rx and Becker's Body Electric for her to read on...and I can't wait to hear her reaction.
>
> Just like that, years of bitterness washed away!

This shows us that things are never black or white .....we sometimes need compassion and forgiveness and an open heart.

We all see things so differently ......

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-09T14:23:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-tallest-hurdle-reconnecting-with-family.23909/post-273911>

We get what we deserve from our choices. It is high time most of you realize it is not about survival of the fittest as the food and exercise gurus have told us. We do not bury our mitochondrial density in our muscles and skeleton as humans. We do it in our brains and hearts. When you realize this the best way to thrive in a 5G world is via your choices that support your ability to think well. **Survival of the wisest > survival of the fittest.** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0-7IHOXkiV8](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0-7IHOXkiV8&fbclid=IwAR1fdgABzYgkjBK7swYiWrpvSuR-CvRRqich8Ge0a5_dYfHvqUpTd93IX1k)

### Dave Key — 2019-07-10T20:44:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-tallest-hurdle-reconnecting-with-family.23909/post-274025>

For all that time I carried around the bad memory of where we left off, and it poisoned me with negativity. It was only keeping me from completely healing in mind body, spirit.
Now, I just reflect on the positive reunion and the change in emotional frequency as a result.

### caroline — 2019-07-12T04:38:34+0300

everyone deserves a second chance ...and maybe even a third chance - but there sure are mitigating circumstances. Everyone sees things so differently.

### Dave Key — 2019-07-13T18:07:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-tallest-hurdle-reconnecting-with-family.23909/post-274260>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=274118)
>
> everyone deserves a second chance ...and maybe even a third chance - but there sure are mitigating circumstances. Everyone sees things so differently.

Here's the kicker: when you feel stepped on in a situation and when you finally experience the same situation again except you're in the other person's shoes, that's when forgiveness kicks in and it becomes necessary to reconcile.

# Thread: Packing our own parachute .....????
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/packing-our-own-parachute.23918/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 27
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### caroline — 2019-07-12T11:33:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/packing-our-own-parachute.23918/post-274138>

I am getting a little confused about this.

I have been thinking that I should be responsible for packing my own parachute. It is great to have help .....but I am the one who is ultimately responsible.

Jack has mentioned in his epic blog ....that he has been packing his own parachute the last number of years and that hasn't been good, and now things have changed.

I need to go back and sift thru his 8000 words to find what Jack said exactly......

I suppose this means that we have to have implicit trust in the chosen others around us?

That is a very scary thought to me......

Is this all about trust?

I am really struggling with this concept. There have been people in my life who have let me down badly. People who should have had my back, who should have been the ultimate support system - without question - but weren't.

My DH's Father was a dick head from day#1 .....not even providing the necessities of life. This man should have been the ultimate support system for his son.

I am sure all of us have had this type of stuff in our lives ......and we learn to be self reliant and responsible for our own actions.

I feel like I am missing something really important.

Is this spiritual?

BTW ....Lindsey Thomley said some really lovely stuff on FB - did you happen to read it?

I try to avoid FB at all costs - but I am so glad that I saw that.

I feel like we all have taken a giant leap forward ....into a new and wonderful realm of self discovery and awareness.

Something really lovely is happening around here.....

But - there has been a huge cost I fear....

no pain - no gain?

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-12T11:53:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/packing-our-own-parachute.23918/post-274141>

I found a family in Poland... I'm devastated to be back here and parted from them.

That 8000 word-er has some deep, deep wisdom.

My friend, you are so special. How about, "Love and pain and the whole damn thing"--always loved that phrase. I guess that we just need to remember that it's all non-linear and just go for it--let the sunshine wipe out darkness in the day, allow the dark to heal us in the night.

### 5G Canary — 2019-07-13T00:32:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/packing-our-own-parachute.23918/post-274206>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=274138)
>
> I am getting a little confused about this.
>
> I have been thinking that I should be responsible for packing my own parachute. It is great to have help .....but I am the one who is ultimately responsible.
>
> Jack has mentioned in his epic blog ....that he has been packing his own parachute the last number of years and that hasn't been good, and now things have changed.
>
> I need to go back and sift thru his 8000 words to find what Jack said exactly......
>
> I suppose this means that we have to have implicit trust in the chosen others around us?
>
> That is a very scary thought to me......
>
> Is this all about trust?
>
> I am really struggling with this concept. There have been people in my life who have let me down badly. People who should have had my back, who should have been the ultimate support system - without question - but weren't.
>
> My DH's Father was a dick head from day#1 .....not even providing the necessities of life. This man should have been the ultimate support system for his son.
>
> I am sure all of us have had this type of stuff in our lives ......and we learn to be self reliant and responsible for our own actions.
>
> I feel like I am missing something really important.
>
> Is this spiritual?
>
> BTW ....Lindsey Thomley said some really lovely stuff on FB - did you happen to read it?
>
> I try to avoid FB at all costs - but I am so glad that I saw that.
>
> I feel like we all have taken a giant leap forward ....into a new and wonderful realm of self discovery and awareness.
>
> Something really lovely is happening around here.....
>
> But - there has been a huge cost I fear....
>
> no pain - no gain?

Caroline... I just love your thoughts always on the mark!

It is very confusing... if we try to understand it. Maybe we don’t need to understand it? Maybe we just need to trust in something more?

Since I feel like the 5G canary aftermath... the bird that just won’t die and won’t stop singing. I thought I would share what actually happened when I jumped and opened my parachute.

In a 5G world it is mind control at its finest. Our bodies are malfunctioning and we are no longer thinking clearly. Our thoughts are no longer matching with our souls. If our family and friends are in that same 5G environment... they also aren’t functioning and thinking clearly. How can they then help with our parachute?

Maybe... if I could have been wise enough to have a circle of six healthy positive individuals I just might not have needed to deploy my parachute? Think of it like skydiving together in a circle and someone’s chute doesn’t open. That person can still be saved.

I believe we draw energy from both the sun and people. I think both sources are critical in order to stay healthy. We are all energy. All connecting. Giving and receiving. What happens when the balance is off? When there is more negative energy then positive? Where do you then find the positive energy to draw from? Is that what 5G is doing forcing us to draw, negative energy? Creating more illnesses and negativity maybe? Detaching people... like a bad virus. Forcing holes into our parachutes?

It seems to be working because it seems to be getting harder and harder to connect with each other in a healthy environment. We can easily find the sun but I think today it’s getting very hard to find healthy people with positive energy... why? Is this the point of technology to detach us from our healthy thoughts and, each other?

I would imagine with a healthy positive circle of six surrounding you that you could remain healthier. It would create a positive circuit... vibration. It could maybe then become contagious and create more circles? Or bigger circles? Could this then make finding a circle of six easier? Couldn’t this energy spread just like a good virus? I think it could. And if it did hopefully you would never need to deploy a parachute.

I always thought I had a good solid parachute. But I also never imagined having to use it. I thought I was spiritual and had a loving family. I thought I was grounded and awakened. But was I? I 100% was not- now looking back! Definitely not in my old 5G world. Not even close.

Jack is absolutely right here... Be prepared for war. It is like getting shot down from a plane. If you are solo... You don’t want a parachute full of holes and you may not know until you really need to use it.

I realized I no longer wanted to live like I was dying... either way I was going to die and I certainly wasn’t going to voluntarily let this 5G beast take my family too.

It was time to go skydiving! I absolutely had to jump and I was all in at that point. I knew I couldn’t do it alone and I put EVERYTHING 100% of it into God’s hands... I was all in. God/Universe would have to be my parachute because there was nothing left of me to give and I was surrounded by a dying circle. I had to trust 100%.

For years I had already been experiencing signs from the universe and “magical coincidences” but I wasn’t understanding what the message or just not ready/able to receive it. It was only when I trusted God/Universe to be my parachute did my awaking really happen for me and I understood what the universe was screaming about.

That’s when the magic turned into miracles and they have been endless. Kinda like the endless rainbows you got from Doug. I had no idea what condition my parachute would be in when I jumped. And let’s just say I wasn’t completely thrilled at first with everything that came with opening my parachute. When the parachute opened there was some pretty crazy stuff that came out! It definitely wasn’t magical unicorns... but it was filled with guardian angels, a new level of conciseness and new tools that I could use to navigate within this new world.

There were people that randomly and unexpectedly entered my life, Jack included. Coincidences? They entered at the moments when I needed them most. They weren’t all family or friends and actually most were complete strangers... this forum and Jack’s tribe in Mexico. We all are energy connecting at different frequencies. It’s finding your vibe... who you resonate with.

“The Universe is always speaking to us... Sending us little messages, causing coincidences and serendipities, reminding us to stop, to look around, to believe in something else, something more.”

For me... we, Jack’s tribe, are the “more.” Maybe there is a little bit of us in each other’s parachutes? Maybe we are that webbing that holds that parachute together?

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-13T14:09:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/packing-our-own-parachute.23918/post-274233>

Most of it is in my journal........... there is a lot more, but I think you would need to experience it to understand.

The resonance with these people, the UV light I got from them, was more powerful than anything I've felt in a long time. It had a major lasting effect on my dopamine and the way I think.

It felt like I'd done about 10 CT tubs in one day.

The aftermath has left some kind of PTSD on all of us, especially the ones I bonded with.

The result is, that a few of us are really working right now on building pathways to be with each other longer term/ permanently.

I think it is more critical bio-hack than probably any of the other RXs on this site inc. CT an Seafood, except for AM Sunrise. Based on my personal experience... but the others agree too.

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-13T14:12:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/packing-our-own-parachute.23918/post-274234>

Yep, Poland was pretty special. You had to have skin in the game and be there to get it.

Right now we are preparing for a hurricane in New Orleans. There are some things we learn on stormy seas that we never learn on calm smooth waters. When the tranquillity of life begins to kill you, the wise seek the chaos of a storm to save our life!
Everyone has their own boat, it's a matter of pulling it out of the sand, and putting it in the water. But further, you can anchor the boat in fear when the storms rage, and go nowhere, let it drift aimlessly on its own or you can let Nature be the navigator and guide you on a journey in a way that is right for you.
Black Swans must learn to mimic submarines; the wiser you become the deeper you go and in the deep, you begin to find that you are unaffected by the storms of life. Way down we go.

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-13T14:19:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/packing-our-own-parachute.23918/post-274237>

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-15T11:27:19+0300

The video does a great job reinforcing the connection we should have with Mother Nature I think. Hint... the lyric you probably think is stupid is key!
>

All that 101010101000 stuff is wild.... and I was sat watching the Sunrise this morning and I looked up to my bookshelf, and (this is how I've started reading the Recommended Books now) I just pull off the shelf whatever I'm sort of "hungry" to read that day....

Lately it's been Mae Wan Ho, but today - for the first time in a few months it was Light in Shaping Life, Van Wijk.

I headed straight to a section about Solitons and Excitons. For me, I know this is the link between Sunlight Photons hitting Proteins = Better Mitochondria, but it is still **_murky_** in my mind how **exactly** it happens step-by-step. I knew that it generated these "waves", and it changed the proteins and made them resonate, but what did it look like on a play by play breakdown?

For some reason, today, I just fucking got it. I found the part about BiSolitons being generated during the synthesis of ATP in the Mitochondria, and I also managed to understand the difference between Solitons and Excitons.

I also saw how the DC Magnetic Field changes the conformation of Di-Electric Moment of Proteins embedded in membranes - without the need for any interaction with molecules like classic Biochemistry says........ So if you can alter the Magnetic Field around the Mitochondrial membrane and change the protein structure. This means you can directly affect the Electron Transport Chain and it's output, without putting a single Glucose or Fat electron or proton near it..........

When Jack says it ain't about Food, it ain't about Food.

As I looked up at the Sun, shaking my head at what I'd just read......... a Butterfly landed on my Window and sat for a while... That has never happened before. It is usually a Spider.

PS. I have no clue what lyric you are referring to. Are you telling me I need to comb my hair on the beach?

It wasn’t even scared of me and almost seemed like it wanted me to see it. I had know idea snakes could swim so fast and it look like it was just having a fun dip in the pool. I don’t know what type it is and I am hoping it’s not poisonous. The irony of its timing had me smiling. Coincidence? Hoping it doesn’t join me again today... ugh!

I love how you are following your intuition and are extremely observant. Two imperative skills in a 5G world. You’ll start to see how everything connects. Kinda like when I posted that specific song and video in your journal. In your journal you mention feeling “stoned”... I dropped a stone to see how awakened you are. You replied with Led Zeppelin’s song “When the Levee Breaks.” Do you know when that song was written and what it’s about? The timing of you posting it just prior to the possibility of it actually breaking? Do you know what the connection is between Led Zeppelin’s John Paul Jones and the song I posted? Was it all just a coincidence? Consciously or subconsciously? We are communicating sometimes on a shallow level and other times on a much deeper level. You are going to go deep because the universe is awaking you.

You’re on the right track with hair but you’ll need to dive deeper. Hair is an electromagnetic antenna. You being hot and sweating makes your hair more conductive. I can’t even imagine having EHS being on a beach with bad nnEMF’s having long thick hair that’s wet or having any product in the hair and hanging out with someone using a 4G cellphone in the water. But maybe saltwater is different? While your body is in the water faraday cage your head and hair are not. Go deep with this one. You have hair in EVERY sweat duct all over your WHOLE body. In a 5G world more hair = more EHS but there is a conundrum because you also need that wireless connection with nativeEMF’s. I think people with EHS tend to have a strong connection with both native and nonnative EMF’s.

I love your journal and you are going to help so many people who hang out in the shallow end. You are forcing them to go deep and that’s how we survive. Just like Jack said be like a submarine... do I hear the Beatles “Yellow Submarine” here? Lol!

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-15T16:37:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/packing-our-own-parachute.23918/post-274340>

It was a light brown/ dark brown colour... with big antennas that were moving about

Yeah but Jack's blog talks about Snakes, very interesting spot... I swear the Universe uses animals as messages. I used to get a lot of Flies on me, when I would eat something "bad" or be on my phone, or if I needed to stop doing something bad... Flies would hover and annoy me, perhaps I'm leaking UV Light due to all the ROS and they want to come see what's going on, or it's a message, or it is both!

I do feel like Jack's theory is beginning to tap into the actual constructs of the Universe itself, obviously the physical but I'm referring to the spiritual interpretations too. There is still a huge amount undiscovered by Science, and I like it that way, so we can have discussions like this...........

Where are you based?

Oh i'd forgot about being Stoned... I've not had that in about 10-11 months... That was Post-Mexico Redox + British Heatwave + Huge influx of Seafood O3s = Endocannibinoid and Endorphin overload in the Brain.

The episodes faded as the Sunlight dropped and then to zero by September - that was the key metric, I've never had a change in quantity of Seafood/ Oily Fish. It makes POMC which = B-Endorphin so it makes sense.

Yeah I didn't see the reference to the NOLA Floods actually - I like that. I didn't know about John P Jones writing strings to Rainbow either... very strange.

And YES about the Hair. Great spot. I think it definitely made me struggle, but that's why I think it's fucking ridiculous to sit on that Beach.... anyone with EHS should really take that advice with a pinch of Salt about Isla... It's not a good spot IMO. But, I know others do well so whatever. The Hair... I have thought about this, if I'd ever shave it, and yeah I do think it makes us more receptive to Earth EMF. But after a moments though, Fuck EMF, I will take these beautiful locks to the fucking grave I ain't even considering cutting them. I'd rather live in a Hut in middle of nowhere. These are **MINE hahaha.**

Thanks for your kind words, I'm really grateful for your insights and perspective too - it is incredibly important for me to see how you see my situation... This is why I love the forum. It is the most important thing on Jack's whole site IMO.

I'm glad I can help others, if only one or two are reading, you have to pay things forward I do believe that. Giving back and helping people comes natural to me. I can't help but put that Superman costume on when I hear the call...... but I am trying to chill on that a bit, at least til I'm really in my own good Redox/ situation.

I think I need to re-read that Blog again, a huge amount of messages I missed the first time.

# Thread: For Aussies - website for checking mobile phone towers
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/for-aussies-website-for-checking-mobile-phone-towers.23922/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jenny S — 2019-07-13T05:10:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/for-aussies-website-for-checking-mobile-phone-towers.23922/post-274222>

[https://www.rfnsa.com.au/?first=1](https://www.rfnsa.com.au/?first=1)

You can use the RFNSA to search for Australian Mobile Network base stations to find Electromagnetic Energy (EME) Reports, site locations, carrier contact details for existing sites and community consultation information for new sites.

I found it easiest to use the Near Address search

thanks!

### Jack Kruse — 2019-09-20T02:51:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/melatonin-controls-the-2-change-programs-in-mitochondria.23928/post-278321>

Blue light lowers melatonin via melanopsin dysfunction.

**BLUE LIGHT IS A STIMULANT THAT CREATES ROS/RNS NORMALLY**

**And stimulants are great. Most Americans drink a few cups of stimulants each morning** ☕️ **to get themselves up to face the daily grind.**

**But you know what's not great? Being stimulated 24 hours of every day by blue light. This ruins the dose response curve of the ROS/RNS. That is exactly what is occuring to modern humans because they live indoors and use tech screens to an excess. What else is different about this version of blue light? The blue light that wakes us up in the sun is NEVER present without 42% IR-A light which is red light. AM sunlight has 42% red light in it and only 1600K of blue light. This small stimulus of blue light is about to improve executive function of the prefrontal cortex. This blue light needs red light to control the oxidation ROS/RNS that blue light makes when it is present without red light in our light environment.**

**ALL CELLS contain ion channels in their outer (plasma) and inner (organelle) membranes. Ion channels, similar to other proteins, are targets of oxidative impact, which modulates ion fluxes across membranes. Subsequently, these ion currents affect electrical excitability, such as action potential discharge (in neurons, muscle, and receptor cells), alteration of the membrane resting potential, synaptic transmission, hormone secretion, muscle contraction or coordination of the cell cycle.**

**An important class of ion channels is the family of potassium (K+) channels, they are not only in charge of the membrane resting potential or the repolarization of the action potentials, but also control cell proliferation or transmitter/hormone release, to name a few. A subgroup of K+ channels are the so called calcium (Ca2+) activated K+ channels which need either an increase of Ca2+ at their intracellular face to open or a combination of Ca2+ and voltage to function properly. Maxi Ca2+ activated K+ channels, also named BK channels which constitute a subgroup of Ca2+ activated K+ channels.**

**DO you know where these ion channels exist in humans? They are found on the inner mitochondrial membrane. EXCESSIVE BLUE LIGHT exposure destroys these potassium ion channels to ruin signaling of cells that control the circadian mechanism and are associated with leptin and melanopsin. LET THAT SINK IN.**

**Mitochondria are a major source of ROS generation targeting BK channels. Blue light creates that stimulus when RED LIGHT IS ABSENT.**

**The inner membrane of mitochondria contains BK channels (mtBK) which appear essential in the production of ROS. mtBK channels appear to be inserted into the mitochondrial membrane with the toxin binding sites for charybdotoxin and iberiotoxin exposed to the mitochondrial intermembrane space. This can be accessed by using outside-out patch configuration of the inner mitochondrial membrane. Consequently the C-terminal tail domain including the Ca2+ binding site is localized to the mitochondrial matrix where the proton gradient exists. RED LIGHT MOVES PROTONS BEST. Blue light creates the most ROS. Do you understand why subtracting red light from blue creates mitochondrial diseases?**

**When you look at your computer screen or phone screen, your brain wakes up. It's alert. Because it hears "It's day time! Time to be focused and do human things!"**

**But guess when it's bad to hear that signal?**

**The other 14 hours of the day that the Sun wouldn't normally be sending such a signal to the brain.**

**We need a break from the stimulus. Otherwise we fry our circuits and get fatigued.**

**So take a break from the blue. Stop the intravenous coffee to your SCN and allow yourself to relax.**

**This is why I Chillax, with Ra Optics blue blockers when I face when red light is removed from the blue light stimulus. The discount code is OPTIMAL.**

[**https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4379900/**](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4379900/)

This small stimulus of blue light is about to improve executive function of the prefrontal cortex. This blue light needs red light to control the oxidation ROS/RNS that blue light makes when it is present without red light in our light environment.**
>
> **ALL CELLS contain ion channels in their outer (plasma) and inner (organelle) membranes. Ion channels, similar to other proteins, are targets of oxidative impact, which modulates ion fluxes across membranes. Subsequently, these ion currents affect electrical excitability, such as action potential discharge (in neurons, muscle, and receptor cells), alteration of the membrane resting potential, synaptic transmission, hormone secretion, muscle contraction or coordination of the cell cycle.**
>
> **An important class of ion channels is the family of potassium (K+) channels, they are not only in charge of the membrane resting potential or the repolarization of the action potentials, but also control cell proliferation or transmitter/hormone release, to name a few. A subgroup of K+ channels are the so called calcium (Ca2+) activated K+ channels which need either an increase of Ca2+ at their intracellular face to open or a combination of Ca2+ and voltage to function properly. Maxi Ca2+ activated K+ channels, also named BK channels which constitute a subgroup of Ca2+ activated K+ channels.**
>
> **DO you know where these ion channels exist in humans? They are found on the inner mitochondrial membrane. EXCESSIVE BLUE LIGHT exposure destroys these potassium ion channels to ruin signaling of cells that control the circadian mechanism and are associated with leptin and melanopsin. LET THAT SINK IN.**
>
> **Mitochondria are a major source of ROS generation targeting BK channels. Blue light creates that stimulus when RED LIGHT IS ABSENT.**
>
> **The inner membrane of mitochondria contains BK channels (mtBK) which appear essential in the production of ROS. mtBK channels appear to be inserted into the mitochondrial membrane with the toxin binding sites for charybdotoxin and iberiotoxin exposed to the mitochondrial intermembrane space. This can be accessed by using outside-out patch configuration of the inner mitochondrial membrane. Consequently the C-terminal tail domain including the Ca2+ binding site is localized to the mitochondrial matrix where the proton gradient exists. RED LIGHT MOVES PROTONS BEST. Blue light creates the most ROS. Do you understand why subtracting red light from blue creates mitochondrial diseases?**
>
> **When you look at your computer screen or phone screen, your brain wakes up. It's alert. Because it hears "It's day time! Time to be focused and do human things!"**
>
> **But guess when it's bad to hear that signal?**
>
> **The other 14 hours of the day that the Sun wouldn't normally be sending such a signal to the brain.**
>
> **We need a break from the stimulus. Otherwise we fry our circuits and get fatigued.**
>
> **So take a break from the blue. Stop the intravenous coffee to your SCN and allow yourself to relax.**
>
> **This is why I Chillax, with Ra Optics blue blockers when I face when red light is removed from the blue light stimulus. The discount code is OPTIMAL.**
>
> [**https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4379900/**](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4379900/)

Dr. [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) - here's a study you may find interesting, even those it's an "old" publication 2007

Optical Realization of Bio-inspired Spiking Neurons In Electron Trapping
[https://repository.upenn.edu/cgi/vi...&httpsredir=1&article=1341&context=ese\_papers](https://repository.upenn.edu/cgi/viewcontent.cgi?referer=https://www.google.com/&httpsredir=1&article=1341&context=ese_papers)​

Electron-trapping materials, which are employed in the structure of optical computational machines, associative memories, optical data storage, and biological models are alkaline-earth sulfides doped with rare-earth luminescence centers. These rare-earth doped elements add trap energy level within the host band-gap. The atomic band structure and the optical mechanism of electron-trapping material (ETM) is displayed in Fig. 1. Illumination of ETM with blue light (wavelength around 450nm) excites some of the electrons of the valance band and sends them to the conduction level. Part of these excited electrons tunnel to the trap energy level and become trapped-electrons. Blue photons also have enough energy to detrap some of the trapped-electrons and produce orange luminescence. Under constant blue light exposure, the generation and recombination processes of electrons balance and the orange luminescence reaches a saturation level. In addition, in a complete dark room without optical excitation, trapped-electrons remain in the trap energy level for a long time.

Exposing the electron-trapping material (ETM) to near infrared (NIR) laser (wavelength around 1310nm) de-traps some of the trapped-electrons, some of which return to the ground state by releasing their extra energy as orange light luminescence at a wavelength around 650nm. The discharging characteristic curves of ETM are shown in Fig. 2(b) where a precharged ETM thin film is exposed to NIR pulses of different intensities. The NIR illumination causes an abrupt jump in the level of orange luminescence; however, the process of discharging becomes slower eventually. When the ETM is simultaneously exposed to the blue and NIR light the intensity of orange luminescence converges, after a short transient response, to a constant value known as the equilibrium-state luminescence of ETM. The intensity of orange luminescence in the equilibrium-state is a function of the intensities of the blue and NIR exposures. An equilibrium-state plane of ETM where contours of constant intensities of orange luminescence are plotted as a function of the blue light and NIR intensities is illustrated in Fig. 3

NIR photons give sufficient energy to the trapped-electrons to elevate them out of the trapping level, allowing them to return to the valance band and release the stored energy in the form of orange luminescence.

Charging characteristic curves of electron trapping material under different levels of constant blue light illumination.

Discharging characteristic curves of electron trapping material under different levels of constant NIR illumination.

(a) Neuron membrane (b) Energy levels of ETM

Optical spiking neuron. A sequence of 4 gaussian blue light pulses stimulate the ETM. This stimulation is strong enough and the optical neuron fires. After firing, the resting state is reinstated eventually. Two signals on the top are the gaussian shaped blue pulse and the α-function shaped NIR pulse that are dual of opening and closing of sodium voltage gated ion channels during depolarization and opening and closing of the potassium ion channels during repolarization process, respectively.
​

In the athlete study, if they had the light treatment in the evening, when there would naturally be plenty of NIR from the setting sun, presumably the increased subcellular melatonin (excess going into the circulation) would be a downstream effect of NIR signalling at a circadian appropriate time to make it in higher amounts, ready for the long hours of darkness. ### Alan Hall — 2019-07-14T14:06:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-from-northern-ireland.23929/post-274276>

Hello everyone,
I’m 46 and here because I’ve been looking for reasons why I had detached retina at the age of 41.
My surgeon saying “it’s just one of those things” wasn’t good enough for me.
I had a previous trauma to the eye and noticed my vision gradually deteriorating. I thought the detachment was because of the trauma and aging.
I have a cataract in the damaged eye and don’t want to go through the procedure to have it removed and the lens replaced.

I now believe the reason was poor diet -thinking I needed carbs for my sport, blue light toxicity - from working indoors at a PC and a lot of iPhone screen time; and pretty much constant wearing of sunglasses - I know, in a country that gets very little sun... crazy!
I now get natural light at every opportunity- some people accuse me of using sunbeds and am finding my vision is improving!
I’m so grateful for the help and advice given freely by Dr Jack Kruse.
I listen to him at every opportunity and have read a lot of the books he recommends.
He deserves a lot more recognition than he receives.
Thanks Dr Kruse.

# Thread: Howdy from Central Alberta
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/howdy-from-central-alberta.23931/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Duane Baumgartner — 2019-07-14T19:56:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/howdy-from-central-alberta.23931/post-274287>

I'm a 69 year old male that has spent most of his life in rural,sunny Alberta. I love all the trees we have and can see the Rocky mountains off to the west when I travel to the west country, a short 30 minute drive. I love where I live. My grandpa homesteaded here in 1898 coming from Ireland. I live only 5 miles from the old homestead that my cousin still farms. My wife, now deceased, always said my roots went to the earth's core.

My whole life I have tried to be aware of what was healthy and what was not. You would never know that by looking at me, 5 foot 8 inches and 240 pounds! I know what to eat and what not to but at times I let my cravings trump my knowledge. I have been involved with many modalities and believe in the powers within.

I worked in construction my whole life and always got lots of sun. I'm an avid fisherman and when I wasn't working you could always find me camping and fishing. Then 2 years ago the bottom fell out of my world. I was diagnosed with Parkinson's disease to go along with my sleep apnea (12 years) and cataracts, which I had surgery on in January and April. Up until that point in my life I had rarely been sick.

Luckily I found a link to one of Jack's podcasts a week ago and things have really started to change. I had heard of **circadian rhythm** but had never paid much attention to it. I know I need to drink healthy water and lots of it, which I do. So for the last 3 days I have been getting up a bit after sunrise and grounding and looking towards the east, the sun. WOW!! Things changed so fast I can hardly believe it. Better frame of mind, way more energy and sleeping much better, just by catching a few rays!! Who would have thunk it!? LOL

Now I'm really getting into this with blue blockers, red light, healthy eating, more seafood and more Jack and his informative videos on Youtube. I have a real thirst now for more knowledge.

Thank you, Dr. Kruse

### Marko Pollo — 2019-07-14T21:24:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/howdy-from-central-alberta.23931/post-274288>

Hey Duane. Welcome. You are in the right place. Im no scientist, but absolutely believe that sunlight and circadian rhythm are non negotiable, critical ingredients of human health. I have great childhood memories of living in Calgary during the early 70s but we were afraid of Ponoka! Now id love to go there. Good luck.

### Duane Baumgartner — 2019-07-14T22:25:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/howdy-from-central-alberta.23931/post-274289>

Hey thanks Marko. I have heard all my life of people being scared of Ponoka because of the provincial mental hospital. There is nothing to fear from most of the mentally ill as they are just sick souls, that have a disease most don't understand, looking for help and compassion. Very sad stories in most cases though there are also violent ones too. They are very well screened before they get "town privileges."

You still in Calgary? If so are you tangled up with the stampede this week? Always a fun time.

### Marko Pollo — 2019-07-14T23:00:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/howdy-from-central-alberta.23931/post-274290>

Duane. I agree with you about mental illness. We were just kids. I moved away after grade 6. Moved alot as a child but Alberta was my favorite place by far. As i think back, im grateful to have lived there. I would love to go to the Stampede again. We went to the pendleton roundup last year and loved it.

### caroline — 2019-07-15T01:53:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/howdy-from-central-alberta.23931/post-274305>

Hi Duane and welcome....

### Tim Enright — 2019-07-15T00:34:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/50-ppm-ddw.23932/post-274293>

I have been trying to locate an inexpensive source for DDW and maybe onto something. It costs more to manufacture 25ppm than 50ppm DDW. Rarely are either needed for normal applications (such as mine). My goal is to bring my total daily intake of water to 130ppm during maintenance and right now bring keep it under 100ppm. In all cases it is cheaper to cut the 50ppm water to this level than the 25ppm water with shipping being the same for either.

I found a company in the US that is producing the water and will soon be offering 50ppm water. I will be buying this water for my practice and thought that I would share this information with the folks here. The 50ppm water is not expected until the next batch at the end of this month so the pricing is not yet on the web site but it was shared with me in a phone conversation. Also, I think I can extend a discount to the people in this forum and have the product shipped directly to you (if that is of interest). Its not much of a discount (5%) as I don't get much of a discount...

[https://extralightwater.com/50-hydrohealth-24pcs-x-500ml-box/](https://extralightwater.com/50-hydrohealth-24pcs-x-500ml-box/)

### Tim Enright — 2019-07-17T18:12:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/50-ppm-ddw.23932/post-274449>

What this means is that you can create 100ppm deuterium depleated water for $5.83 a liter. Preventa is $12.64 a liter (excluding shipping) for 105 ppm and if created 100ppm DDW from Qlarivia 25 it would cost you $7.08 delivered.

ExtraLightWater 50ppm= $140/24= $5.83 L 100ppm
ExtraLightWater 25ppm= $180/(24\*1.25)= $6.00 L 100ppm
Qlarivia 25ppm= $425/(48\*1.25)=$7.08 L 100ppm
Preventa 105ppm= $227/(12\*1.5)= $12.64 L 105ppm

This price is something i can live with and will be doing a little more research on the source. I believe this to be a byproduct of the production of heavy water. More on this later...

Final edit: corrected calculations and added another option

Hey Jan, I believe you missed the main point. It is cheaper to manufacture 50ppm than 25ppm ($140 per case vs $180). So if you are cutting to around 100ppm which is actually cheaper assuming the shipping costs are the same (which they are)?
